sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Audio memory variants
queue.reason: Only expand rhythm-memory play if future work adds distinct chart grammars, non-audio summaries, tutorial callouts, melody drafting, duet modes, or richer accessibility review paths rather than more channel labels.

queue.title: Stormwater simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand civic-resilience play if future work adds distinct watershed shapes, tutorial storms, accessible route summaries, equity tradeoffs, or richer climate events rather than more tool labels.

queue.title: Greenhouse simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand crop-simulation play if future work adds distinct season grammars, tutorial plots, accessible text summaries, multi-greenhouse contracts, weather fronts, or richer biology tradeoffs rather than more crop labels.

queue.title: Sonar deduction variants
queue.reason: Only expand spatial-deduction play if future work adds distinct map grammars, tutorial contracts, accessible text summaries, cooperative marker planning, or richer uncertainty tools rather than more wreck labels.

queue.title: Physics aiming variants
queue.reason: Only expand physics-launch play if future work adds distinct surfaces, tutorial shots, accessibility review paths, wind fields, multiplayer targets, or richer trajectory planning rather than more asteroid labels.

queue.title: Stealth planning variants
queue.reason: Only expand stealth play if future work adds distinct floor grammars, patrol tutorials, accessibility review paths, non-visual map summaries, or multi-objective heists rather than more room labels.

queue.title: Cargo loading variants
queue.reason: Only expand loading-balance play if future work adds distinct deck geometry, tutorial hauls, accessibility review paths, live conveyor timing, or multi-stop contracts rather than more cargo labels.

queue.title: Information resilience variants
queue.reason: Only expand rumor-containment play if future work adds distinct scenario grammars, tutorial desks, accessibility review paths, multilingual cues, or richer stakeholder models rather than more rumor labels.

queue.title: Spatial pattern variants
queue.reason: Only expand tile-arrangement play if future work adds distinct puzzle grammars, tutorials, accessibility review paths, or multi-board commissions rather than more patron labels.

queue.title: Auction economy variants
queue.reason: Only expand bidding and valuation play if future work adds distinct auction formats, tutorial routes, accessibility review paths, portfolio synergies, or negotiation events rather than more lot labels.

queue.title: Timeline causality variants
queue.reason: Only expand causality-ordering play if future work adds distinct branch graphs, tutorial archives, accessible review paths, or multi-thread timelines rather than more event labels.

queue.title: Word strategy variants
queue.reason: Only expand word-routing play if future work adds distinct clue grammars, accessibility review paths, language-difficulty settings, tutorial briefs, or multiplayer draft constraints rather than more word labels.

recentDecisions.title: Signal Symphony 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local rhythm-memory strategy game with four-channel sequencing, listen and replay loops, battery pressure, noise gates, stabilizer and skip recovery choices, mode progression, session-only Encore unlocks, scoring, responsive SVG/DOM-style channel motion, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.
